title: Netsol Technologies Digital Technologies is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Netsol Technologies Digital Technologies is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Netsol Technologies Digital Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Thane operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Netsol Technologies Digital Technologies:
Netsol Technologies Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Netsol Technologies Digital Technologies!
